seoTitle: Murrumbeena vs Musk — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Murrumbeena and Musk. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Murrumbeena and Musk.
heading: Murrumbeena vs Musk — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Murrumbeena, Victoria and Musk, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Musk has a lower overall climate risk score (38/100) compared to Murrumbeena (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Murrumbeena or Musk safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Murrumbeena has a flood risk score of 41/100, while Musk scores 24/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Murrumbeena scores 54/100 for bushfire risk. Musk scores 49/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Murrumbeena or Musk?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Musk has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.58% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
